parameters.query:
WITH latest AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (old_file, new_file)
    id, old_file, new_file, diff_data, created_at
  FROM diff_results
  WHERE diff_count > 0
  ORDER BY old_file, new_file, created_at DESC
)
SELECT json_build_object(
  'data', COALESCE(json_agg(
            json_build_object(
              'run_id', id::text,
              'old_file', regexp_replace(old_file, '^.*/', ''),
              'new_file', regexp_replace(new_file, '^.*/', ''),
              'added',   COALESCE(jsonb_array_length(diff_data->'added'), 0),
              'deleted', COALESCE(jsonb_array_length(diff_data->'deleted'), 0),
              'changed', CASE WHEN jsonb_typeof(diff_data->'changed')='object'
                           THEN (SELECT count(*) FROM jsonb_object_keys(diff_data->'changed')) ELSE 0 END,
              'timestamp', to_char(created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI:SS')
            ) ORDER BY created_at DESC
          ), '[]'::json),
  'date', to_char(max(created_at), 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI:SS'),
  'last_week_date', NULL
) AS result
FROM latest;

SELECT id,
       regexp_replace(old_file,'^.*/','') AS old_file,
       regexp_replace(new_file,'^.*/','') AS new_file,
       diff_data
FROM diff_results
WHERE regexp_replace(old_file,'^.*/','') ILIKE $1
  AND regexp_replace(new_file,'^.*/','') ILIKE $2
  AND diff_count > 0
ORDER BY created_at DESC
LIMIT 1

parameters.responseBody: ={{ $json._status === 200 ? { run_id: $json.run_id, old_file: $json.old_file, new_file: $json.new_file, added: $json.added, deleted: $json.deleted, changed: $json.changed } : { error: $json.error, run_id: '', old_file: $json.old_file, new_file: $json.new_file, added: [], deleted: [], changed: [] } }}
